do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test: Different service_variant. route_b44-brt-phase2 has no service_variant (unknown) while route_b44-limited has limited_stop. Variant mismatch forces do_not_merge per route identity rule.
Contradiction test: Different service_variant. route_b44-brt-phase2 has no service_variant (unknown) while route_b44-local has local. Variant mismatch forces do_not_merge.
Contradiction test: Different service_variant. route_b44-brt-phase2 has no service_variant (unknown) while route_b44-sbs has sbs. Variant mismatch forces do_not_merge.
Contradiction test: Different service_variant. route_b44-limited has limited_stop, route_b44-local has local. Different variants never merge per route identity rule.
Contradiction test: Different service_variant. route_b44-limited has limited_stop, route_b44-sbs has sbs. Different variants never merge per route identity rule.
Contradiction test: Different service_variant. route_b44-local has local, route_b44-sbs has sbs. Different variants never merge per route identity rule.

rationale: All records share base route B44 but differ in service_variant (limited, local, sbs) or lack a variant (brt-phase2). According to the Identity Merge Canon for routes, different service variants are never merged. Even the variant-unspecified record cannot merge into any variant-specific record because that would assign a variant absent in the source evidence. All pairs are therefore distinct and should not be merged. None have contradicting identity fields beyond variant; the records within each variant collection (e.g., the many date-suffixed aliases for route_b44-limited) are correctly unified under the durable variant record and are not part of cross-variant merge decisions. [auto-accepted structurally per docs/identity-merge-canon.md; model confidence ignored]
